property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\windows\system32;C:\windows;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\windows\system32;C:\windows;C:\windows\System32\Wbem;C:\windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA App\NvDLISR;C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\HP\OMEN-Broadcast\Common;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.12\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Users\qasar\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;.

testcase.name: TC01 - Verify user can login with valid credentials
testcase.system-out: [START] I have a valid login request payload [END] I have a valid login request payload -> PASSED [START] I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "LoginAPI" [END] I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "LoginAPI" -> PASSED [START] ecommerce "loginResponse" response status code should be 200 [END] ecommerce "loginResponse" response status code should be 200 -> PASSED [START] ecommerce "loginResponse" response body should contain a valid "token" [END] ecommerce "loginResponse" response body should contain a valid "token" -> PASSED [START] ecommerce "loginResponse" response body should contain a valid "userId" [END] ecommerce "loginResponse" response body should contain a valid "userId" -> PASSED [START] ecommerce "loginResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.login.response.msg" [END] ecommerce "loginResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.login.response.msg" -> PASSED

testcase.name: TC02 - Verify user can add a product with valid payload
testcase.system-out: [START] I have a valid add product request payload [END] I have a valid add product request payload -> PASSED [START] I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "AddProductAPI" [END] I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "AddProductAPI" -> PASSED [START] I store the "productId" from the "addProductResponse" response [END] I store the "productId" from the "addProductResponse" response -> PASSED [START] ecommerce "addProductResponse" response status code should be 201 [END] ecommerce "addProductResponse" response status code should be 201 -> PASSED [START] ecommerce "addProductResponse" response body should contain a valid "productId" [END] ecommerce "addProductResponse" response body should contain a valid "productId" -> PASSED [START] ecommerce "addProductResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.addProduct.response.msg" [END] ecommerce "addProductResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.addProduct.response.msg" -> PASSED Running cleanup after: TC02 - Verify user can add a product with valid payload

testcase.name: TC03 - Verify product is persisted correctly after adding
testcase.system-out: [START] I have a valid add product request payload [END] I have a valid add product request payload -> PASSED [START] I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "AddProductAPI" [END] I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "AddProductAPI" -> PASSED [START] I store the "productId" from the "addProductResponse" response [END] I store the "productId" from the "addProductResponse" response -> PASSED [START] I have a valid get product detail request payload [END] I have a valid get product detail request payload -> PASSED [START] I send a "GET" request to endpoint with "GetProductDetailAPI" [END] I send a "GET" request to endpoint with "GetProductDetailAPI" -> PASSED [START] ecommerce "getProductDetailResponse" response status code should be 200 [END] ecommerce "getProductDetailResponse" response status code should be 200 -> PASSED [START] ecommerce "getProductDetailResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.getProductDetail.response.msg" [END] ecommerce "getProductDetailResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.getProductDetail.response.msg" -> PASSED Running cleanup after: TC03 - Verify product is persisted correctly after adding

testcase.name: TC04 - Verify user can add product to cart
testcase.system-out: [START] I have a valid add product request payload [END] I have a valid add product request payload -> PASSED [START] I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "AddProductAPI" [END] I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "AddProductAPI" -> PASSED [START] I store the "productId" from the "addProductResponse" response [END] I store the "productId" from the "addProductResponse" response -> PASSED [START] I have a valid get product detail request payload [END] I have a valid get product detail request payload -> PASSED [START] I send a "GET" request to endpoint with "GetProductDetailAPI" [END] I send a "GET" request to endpoint with "GetProductDetailAPI" -> PASSED [START] ecommerce "getProductDetailResponse" response status code should be 200 [END] ecommerce "getProductDetailResponse" response status code should be 200 -> PASSED [START] I store the "data.productImage" from the "getProductDetailResponse" response [END] I store the "data.productImage" from the "getProductDetailResponse" response -> PASSED [START] I have a valid add to cart request payload [END] I have a valid add to cart request payload -> PASSED [START] I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "AddToCartAPI" [END] I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "AddToCartAPI" -> PASSED [START] ecommerce "addToCartResponse" response status code should be 200 [END] ecommerce "addToCartResponse" response status code should be 200 -> PASSED [START] ecommerce "addToCartResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.addToCart.response.msg" [END] ecommerce "addToCartResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.addToCart.response.msg" -> PASSED Running cleanup after: TC04 - Verify user can add product to cart

testcase.name: TC05 - Verify user can create an order successfully
testcase.system-out: [START] I have a valid add product request payload [END] I have a valid add product request payload -> PASSED [START] I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "AddProductAPI" [END] I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "AddProductAPI" -> PASSED [START] I store the "productId" from the "addProductResponse" response [END] I store the "productId" from the "addProductResponse" response -> PASSED [START] I have a valid create order request payload [END] I have a valid create order request payload -> PASSED [START] I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "CreateOrderAPI" [END] I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "CreateOrderAPI" -> PASSED [START] ecommerce "createOrderResponse" response status code should be 201 [END] ecommerce "createOrderResponse" response status code should be 201 -> PASSED [START] ecommerce "createOrderResponse" response body should contain a valid "orders" [END] ecommerce "createOrderResponse" response body should contain a valid "orders" -> PASSED [START] ecommerce "createOrderResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.create.order.response" [END] ecommerce "createOrderResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.create.order.response" -> PASSED [START] ecommerce "createOrderResponse" response body should contain "productOrderId[0]" as "productId" [END] ecommerce "createOrderResponse" response body should contain "productOrderId[0]" as "productId" -> PASSED Running cleanup after: TC05 - Verify user can create an order successfully

testcase.name: TC06 - Verify order is persisted correctly after creation
testcase.system-out: [START] I have a valid add product request payload [END] I have a valid add product request payload -> PASSED [START] I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "AddProductAPI" [END] I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "AddProductAPI" -> PASSED [START] I store the "productId" from the "addProductResponse" response [END] I store the "productId" from the "addProductResponse" response -> PASSED [START] I have a valid create order request payload [END] I have a valid create order request payload -> PASSED [START] I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "CreateOrderAPI" [END] I send a "POST" request to endpoint with "CreateOrderAPI" -> PASSED [START] ecommerce "createOrderResponse" response status code should be 201 [END] ecommerce "createOrderResponse" response status code should be 201 -> PASSED [START] I store the "orders[0]" from the "createOrderResponse" response [END] I store the "orders[0]" from the "createOrderResponse" response -> PASSED [START] I have a valid get order request [END] I have a valid get order request -> PASSED [START] I send a "GET" request to endpoint with "GetOrderAPI" [END] I send a "GET" request to endpoint with "GetOrderAPI" -> PASSED [START] ecommerce "getOrderResponse" response status code should be 200 [END] ecommerce "getOrderResponse" response status code should be 200 -> PASSED [START] ecommerce "getOrderResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.get.order.response.msg" [END] ecommerce "getOrderResponse" response body should contain "message" as "ecomm.get.order.response.msg" -> PASSED Running cleanup after: TC06 - Verify order is persisted correctly after creation
